changelog: Initial release - Proof of Value evaluation tasks

tasks.name: Explain Variables
tasks.description: Test ability to explain programming fundamentals
tasks.userMessage: Explain the difference between let, const, and var in JavaScript

tasks.name: Explain Async/Await
tasks.description: Test ability to explain async programming
tasks.userMessage: How does async/await work in JavaScript? Give a simple example

tasks.name: Explain TypeScript Types
tasks.description: Test ability to explain type systems
tasks.userMessage: What are the benefits of using TypeScript over plain JavaScript?

tasks.name: Explain Git Branching
tasks.description: Test ability to explain version control
tasks.userMessage: Explain how Git branching works and when to use feature branches

tasks.name: Explain REST APIs
tasks.description: Test ability to explain web concepts
tasks.userMessage: What is a REST API? Explain the main HTTP methods

tasks.name: Implement isPrime
tasks.userMessage: Write a TypeScript function called isPrime that checks if a number is prime. Include edge cases.

tasks.name: Implement Debounce
tasks.userMessage: Implement a debounce function in TypeScript with proper typing

tasks.name: Implement Fetch Wrapper
tasks.userMessage: Write a TypeScript fetch wrapper with retry logic, timeout, and error handling

tasks.name: Implement Stack
tasks.userMessage: Implement a generic Stack<T> class in TypeScript with push, pop, peek, and isEmpty methods

tasks.name: Implement Email Validator
tasks.userMessage: Write a TypeScript function that validates email addresses using regex and returns detailed error messages

tasks.name: Architecture: Design Patterns
tasks.userMessage: Compare the Repository pattern vs Active Record pattern for database access. When should you use each?

tasks.name: Architecture: Caching Strategy
tasks.userMessage: Design a multi-level caching strategy for a high-traffic API. Include cache invalidation approaches.

tasks.name: Architecture: Microservices
tasks.userMessage: How would you decompose a monolithic e-commerce application into microservices? What communication patterns would you use?

tasks.name: Architecture: API Security
tasks.userMessage: Design a comprehensive API security layer including authentication, authorization, rate limiting, and input validation

tasks.name: Architecture: Database Scaling
tasks.userMessage: Explain horizontal vs vertical scaling for PostgreSQL. When would you use read replicas, sharding, or partitioning?
